location: On a corpse at the bottom of a long platforming descent down the cliff west of the Bestial Sanctum, at the northern tip of Caelid.

source.name: Corpse below Bestial Sanctum's west cliff

tactics: From the cliff west of Bestial Sanctum, work your way down through roots, pillar tops, and rock outcrops — throwing Rainbow Stones ahead helps mark safe landing spots.
The Dragoncrest Shield Talisman sits at the same lower level, so grab both items on one careful descent.
Falling from too high kills you outright — treat this as a patience puzzle, not a speed run.
lore: A ceremonial short blade once issued to high-ranking clergy of Farum Azula, said to boost the potency of bestial incantations. Its five-fingered hilt design symbolizes an intelligence once believed to have been granted to beasts.

builds.name: Bestial incantation booster
builds.why: Passively boosts Bestial incantation damage by 10% just by being equipped (up to 21% paired with the Clawmark Seal), making it a go-to off-hand for a beast-incantation build even without swinging it.

builds.name: Early Strength quality dagger
builds.why: High base physical damage and D Strength scaling make it a solid pure-melee pickup needing only 10 Strength / 10 Dexterity.
